name: extract_invoice_line_items
description: Extract every line item (itemized row) from a single vendor invoice.

items.description: One entry per visible line-item row. Empty array if no itemized table is present.

description.description: Exact text of the line as it appears in the document.

quantity.description: Quantity if present; null for flat-fee service lines.

unit_price.description: Unit price if present; null for flat-fee service lines.

confidence.description: Self-reported per-row certainty. LOGGED, NEVER TRUSTED for triage.
